summary: Iteration 174 - Admin Console Features (Map Editor, Analytics, Queue) and Caribbean/Pacific Spot Expansion COMPLETE. Backend: All 16 tests passed. Frontend: All Admin Console tabs verified (Analytics with A/B Testing dashboard, Map Editor with Precision Edit, Queue with 20 flagged spots). Total spots: 1,247 with new Caribbean/Pacific expansion.

issues: Map tiles may take a moment to load - consider adding a loading indicator

critical_code_review_comments: AdminAnalyticsDashboard.js correctly implements A/B Testing dashboard with conversion funnel
AdminSpotEditor.js implements Map Editor with Precision Edit, drag-and-drop, NOAA buoy assignment
Surf spots API returns 1,247 total spots as expected
New spots verified: Bahamas (10), BVI (7), Cook Islands (6), Bermuda (8), Canary Islands in Spain (18)
NOAA buoy field (noaa_buoy_id) exists in SurfSpot model at line 362 of models.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 174 verified Admin Console features: Map Editor tab with Precision Edit and NOAA buoy assignment, Analytics tab with A/B Testing dashboard and conversion funnel, Queue tab with 20 flagged spots. Total spots: 1,247. New spots: Bahamas (10), BVI (7), Cook Islands (6), Bermuda (8), Canary Islands in Spain (18 spots across Tenerife, Gran Canaria, Lanzarote, Fuerteventura). Analytics endpoints return mock funnel data when no real transactions exist.
